title: Start VI
description:
Starts a program that will run in the Controller.

Inputs

Spel Ref
		 In	Spel reference from a previous Spel
		 Ref Out.

Error In	Error condition from a previous Spel
		 node.

Program
				 Number	SPEL+
				 Function Name

0	main

1	main1

2	main2

3	main3

4	main4

5	main5

6	main6

...	...

63	main63

main63

Outputs

Spel Ref
		 Out	Spel reference output for next VI to
		 use.

Error Out	Error condition output for subsequent
		 Spel nodes.
notes:
When Start is executed, control will return immediately to the calling VI.  You cannot start a program that is already running.
  Note that Start causes global variables in the Controller to be cleared and default robot points to be loaded.
see_also:
Continue, Pause, Stop, Xqt

Start Example
